reauth_confirm.description: To re-authenticate with PVOutput you'll need to get the API key at {account_url}.

reconfigure.description: Reconfigure your PVOutput integration. You can update your API key at {account_url}.

data_description.api_key: Your PVOutput API key, which can be found in your PVOutput account settings at {account_url}.
data_description.system_id: The numeric system ID for the PV system you want to track, listed on the same account page.

user.description:
To authenticate with PVOutput you'll need to get the API key at {account_url}.

The system IDs of registered systems are listed on that same page.

communication_error.message: An error occurred while communicating with the PVOutput service.

no_data_available.message: The PVOutput service has no data available for this system.

unknown_error.message: An unknown error occurred while communicating with the PVOutput service.
